translations.description: Hold your dumbbells at your sides and hinge at the hips until your chest is parallel to the floor, dumbbells hanging below your knees (picture 1). Keeping your elbows close to your body, row both dumbbells towards your hips (oicture 2). Squeeze your shoulder blades down and together and lower under control to the start before repeating. Avoid using momentum from your torso and focus on squeezing your back, hard.

notes.comment: Hold your dumbbells at your sides and hinge at the hips until your chest is parallel to the floor, dumbbells hanging below your knees (picture 1).
Keeping your elbows close to your body, row both dumbbells towards your hips (picture 2).
Squeeze your shoulder blades down and together and lower under control to the start before repeating. Avoid using momentum from your torso and focus on squeezing your back, hard.

translations.name: Close-grip Press-ups
translations.description: Drop into a strong plank position, bringing your hands close together until they're almost touching. (picture 1) Bend your elbows to slowly bring your chest to the floor (picture 2). Keep your elbows close to your body as you push back up explosively. Repeat. Ensure you take your time lowering on each rep, keeping your form sharp.

translations.name: Dumbbell Hang Power Cleans
translations.description: On your feet, stand tall with your dumbbells, holding them at your sides. Hinge at the hips to lower them to your knees (picture 1). Stand back up with a slight jump, using the momentum to pull the dumbbells up on to your shoulders (picture 2). Stand up straight, then lower under control to your sides and repeat. Keep this fast and explosive; if your heart rate doesn’t hit the roof, you’re doing them wrong.

translations.name: Dumbbell sumo deadlift
translations.description: Lower your dumbbell to the ground between your legs. Assume a wide stance and with a straight back squat down. With the dumbbell standing upright, grip it by the top of the ‘head’ (picture 1). Keeping your chest up and core braced, push the floor away, driving back upwards to a standing position (picture 2). Repeat. If you can easily achieve 20-30 reps, use two dumbbells.

translations.name: Abdominales rusas
translations.description: sentado en el suelo agarramos la pesa rusa, flexionamos las piernas y las separamos del suelo. Ahora llevaremos a un lado y otro la pesa

translations.name: Medicine ball twist
translations.description: In a seated position, the torso is rotated from side to side without forcing, approaching the knees and making the ball touch the ground from time to time

notes.comment: Exercise can also be performed without a medicine ball

translations.name: Russian twist con palla medica
translations.description: a sit-up completo, si ruota il busto da un lato all'altro senza forzare, avvicinandosi alle ginocchia e facendo toccare la palla a terra di volta in volta.

translations.name: Vpushup
translations.description: Lift your body off the ground by pushing your arms upwards

translations.name: Vpushup
translations.description: Sollevare il proprio corpo da terra spingendosi con le braccia verso l'alto

translations.name: Plancha a una mano alterna
translations.description: En la posición de plancha correcta, coloque los pies a una distancia ligeramente superior a la anchura de los hombros. Levante y toque alternativamente el hombro opuesto con una mano.

translations.name: Plank Shoulter Taps
translations.description: In the correct plank position, place your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. alternately lift and touch the opposite shoulder with one hand.

translations.name: Plank shoulder taps
translations.description: Nella posizione di plank corretta  divarica leggermente i piedi oltre la larghezza delle spalle. solleva e tocca con la mano la spalla opposta in modo alternato.

translations.name: Unilateral Cable row
translations.description: With an inclined bench in front of the cable row machine, do onehanded rows with focus on a big stretch in the lats.

translations.name: Dumbbell Front Squat
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height and performing a squat. It targets the lower body muscles, including the quads, hamstrings, and glutes, while also engaging the core and upper body.

translations.name: Squat avant avec haltères
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans chaque main à hauteur d'épaule et à effectuer un squat. Il cible les muscles du bas du corps, notamment les quadriceps, les ischio-jambiers et les fessiers, tout en engageant également le tronc (le core) et le haut du corps.

translations.name: Kettlebell One Legged Deadlift
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a kettlebell in one hand and standing on one leg while bending forward to touch the kettlebell to the ground. It targets the hamstrings, glutes, and lower back while also improving balance and stability.

translations.name: Soulevé de terre unilatéral
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un kettlebell (ou une cloche) dans une main et à se tenir sur une jambe tout en se penchant vers l'avant pour toucher le sol avec le kettlebell. Il cible les ischio-jambiers, les fessiers et le bas du dos, tout en améliorant également l'équilibre et la stabilité.

translations.name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
translations.description: This exercise involves sitting on the ground with a dumbbell resting on the hips, then thrusting the hips upward while squeezing the glutes. It is a great exercise for strengthening the glutes and improving hip mobility.

translations.name: Hip Thrust avec haltère
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à s'asseoir sur le sol avec un haltère posé sur les hanches, puis à pousser les hanches vers le haut tout en contractant les fessiers. C'est un excellent exercice pour renforcer les fessiers et améliorer la mobilité des hanches.

translations.name: Dumbbell Incline Fly
translations.description: This exercise involves lying on an incline bench and holding dumbbells in each hand. The arms are then extended out to the sides, parallel to the ground, and then brought back together in a hugging motion. This exercise primarily targets the chest muscles.

translations.name: Écarté incliné avec haltères
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à s'allonger sur un banc incliné et à tenir un haltère dans chaque main. Les bras sont ensuite étendus sur les côtés, parallèlement au sol, puis ramenés l'un vers l'autre dans un mouvement d'étreinte (ou d'enveloppement). Cet exercice cible principalement les muscles de la poitrine.

translations.name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
translations.description: The dumbbell decline bench press is a great exercise for targeting your lower chest muscles

translations.name: Développé couché décliné
translations.description: Le développé couché décliné avec haltères est un excellent exercice pour cibler les muscles inférieurs de la poitrine.

translations.name: Dumbbell Shrug
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in each hand and shrugging your shoulders up towards your ears, then lowering them back down. It primarily targets the trapezius muscles in the upper back and can help improve posture and shoulder stability.

translations.name: Shrug avec haltères
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans chaque main et à hausser les épaules vers les oreilles, puis à les redescendre. Il cible principalement les muscles trapèzes dans le haut du dos et peut aider à améliorer la posture ainsi que la stabilité de l'épaule.

translations.name: Crunch lesté
translations.description: Le Crunch lesté cible principalement les grands droits de l'abdomen (les fameuses "tablettes de chocolat").

translations.name: Weighted Crunch
translations.description:
The Weighted Crunch is a variation of the classic crunch exercise that involves adding resistance (a weight) to increase the intensity of the abdominal work.
  1. Lay down
  2. (Optional) Bend your knees to add difficulty
  3. (Optional) Bend your knees and let your feet rest on a bench or a box or something (90 degree angle on knees)
  4. Lift your head and torso while bending your back forward (if you don't it's a sit-up and also involves some back muscles). The higher you go, the more you should feel your abs contracting.
  5. Go back to starting position an repeat

translations.name: Concentration Curl
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in one hand and curling it towards the shoulder while keeping the upper arm stationary. It primarily targets the biceps muscle.

translations.name: Curl biceps avec haltère
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans une main et à le lever (ou le "curler") vers l'épaule tout en gardant le haut du bras immobile. Il cible principalement le muscle biceps.

translations.name: Dumbbell Side Bend
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in one hand and bending sideways to work the oblique muscles on the side of the body. It can be done standing or seated and is often used as a core strengthening exercise.

translations.name: Flexion Latérale avec haltère
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans une main et à se pencher sur le côté pour travailler les muscles obliques sur le flanc du corps. Il peut être effectué debout ou assis et est souvent utilisé comme exercice de renforcement du tronc (core strengthening).

translations.name: Dumbbell Rear Lunge
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in each hand and stepping back into a lunge position, then returning to standing. It primarily targets the glutes, hamstrings, and quadriceps.

translations.name: Fente arrière avec haltères
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans chaque main et à reculer pour se mettre en position de fente (lunge), puis à revenir à la position debout. Il cible principalement les fessiers, les ischio-jambiers et les quadriceps.

translations.name: Dumbbell Side Squat
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in one hand and performing a squat while stepping to the side. It targets the legs, glutes, and core muscles.

translations.name: Squat latéral avec haltère
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans une main et à effectuer un squat tout en faisant un pas latéral (step to the side). Il cible les jambes, les fessiers et les muscles du tronc (core muscles).

translations.name: Elevação lateral na mãquina
translations.description: A elevação lateral na máquina é um exercício isolado que trabalha o músculo deltoide medial (lateral) para construir ombros mais largos e definidos. O caminho de movimento fixo da máquina proporciona maior estabilidade do que com halteres, tornando-a ideal para iniciantes ou para aqueles que desejam se concentrar apenas na ativação muscular.

translations.name: Machine lateral wise
translations.description: The machine lateral raise is an isolation exercise that targets the medial (side) deltoid muscle to build wider, more defined shoulders. The machine's fixed path of motion provides greater stability than dumbbells, making it ideal for beginners or those who want to focus solely on muscle activation.

translations.name: Machine Chest Press Exercise
translations.description: . It provides an effective but straightforward way to work your upper body. With no weights to balance and no tricky techniques to master, the chest press leaves you free to focus on your training.

translations.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
translations.description: This exercise involves holding a dumbbell in each hand and bending forward at the hips while keeping the back straight, then returning to a standing position. It primarily targets the hamstrings and glutes.

translations.name: Soulevé de terre roumain avec haltères
translations.description: Cet exercice consiste à tenir un haltère dans chaque main et à se pencher vers l'avant au niveau des hanches tout en gardant le dos droit, puis à revenir à la position debout. Il cible principalement les ischio-jambiers et les fessiers.

translations.name: 2 Handed Kettlebell Swing
translations.description: Two Handed Russian Style Kettlebell swing

translations.name: Incline Skull Crush
translations.description: Siting in a 45 Degree Angle, using DB to do Incline Skull Crush

translations.name: Elevación Deltoides Posterior
translations.description: Sentado en un banco con las mancuernas en el suelo, inclínate a 45 grados y luego levanta lentamente cada mancuerna hasta la altura del hombro y mantén durante un par de segundos antes de bajar a la posición inicial.

translations.name: Rear Delt Raise
translations.description: Seated on a bench with the dumbbells on the floor bend over at 45 Degrees and then slowly raise each dumbbell to shoulder height and hold for a couple seconds before lowering to the starting position.

translations.name: Alongamento frontal do pescoço
translations.description:
Posição inicial:

Sente-se ou fique em pé com as costas retas.

Passos:

  1. Abra bem a boca.
  2. Incline lentamente a cabeça para trás com a boca aberta. Se sentir necessidade de apoio, junte as mãos atrás da cabeça.
  3. Feche e abra a boca muito lentamente.
  4. Ao final, retorne lentamente à posição inicial e feche a boca.

translations.name: Collo anteriore allungato
translations.description:
Posizione di partenza:

Seduti o in piedi con la schiena dritta.

Passi:

  1. Aprire bene la bocca.
  2. Inclinare lentamente la testa all'indietro con la bocca aperta. Se senti il bisogno di un sostegno, stringi le mani dietro la testa.
  3. Chiudere e aprire molto lentamente la bocca.
  4. Alla fine, torna lentamente alla posizione di partenza e chiudi la bocca.

translations.name: Front neck stretch
translations.description:
Starting position:

Sit or stand with your back straight.

Steps:

  1. Open mouth wide.
  2. Slowly tilt head back with mouth opened. If you feel the need for support, clasp your hands behind your head.
  3. Very slowly close and open your mouth.
  4. At the end, slowly return to starting position and close mouth.

translations.name: Nackenstütze vorne
translations.description:
Ausgangsposition:

Sitzen oder stehen Sie mit geradem Rücken.

Schritte:

  1. Öffnen Sie den Mund weit.
  2. Neigen Sie den Kopf bei geöffnetem Mund langsam nach hinten. Wenn Sie das Gefühl haben, dass Sie Unterstützung brauchen, verschränken Sie Ihre Hände hinter dem Kopf.
  3. Schließen und öffnen Sie den Mund ganz langsam.
  4. Am Ende kehren Sie langsam in die Ausgangsposition zurück und schließen den Mund.

translations.name: Peregangan leher depan
translations.description:
Posisi awal:

Duduk atau berdiri dengan punggung lurus.

Langkah:

  1. Buka mulut lebar-lebar.
  2. Perlahan miringkan kepala ke belakang dengan mulut terbuka. Jika Anda merasa perlu untuk dukungan, bertepuk tangan di belakang kepala.
  3. Sangat perlahan tutup dan Buka mulut Anda.
  4. Pada akhirnya, perlahan kembali ke posisi awal dan tutup mulut.

translations.name: Protažení přední strany krku
translations.description:
Výchozí poloha:

Postavte se nebo si sedněte s narovnanými zády.

Kroky:

  1. Otevřete ústa do O.
  2. Pomalu zakloňte hlavu s ústy otevřenými. Pokud potřebujete hlavu podpořit, sepněte za ní ruce.
  3. Velmi pomalu zavírejte a otevírejte ústa.
  4. Nakonec se vraťte do výchozí polohy a ústa zavřete.

translations.name: Voor nekrekking
translations.description:
Beginpositie:

Zit of sta met rechte rug.

Stappen:

  1. Mond wijd open.
  2. Kantel het hoofd langzaam naar achteren met de mond open. Als u behoefte heeft aan steun, klem dan uw handen achter uw hoofd.
  3. Sluit en open heel langzaam uw mond.
  4. Aan het einde keert u langzaam terug naar de beginpositie en sluit u de mond.
author_history: floris van den bosch (imported from Feeel)

translations.name: Διάταση λαιμού εμπρός
translations.description:
Θέση εκκίνησης:

Κάθισε ή στάσου όρθιος με την πλάτη ίσια.

Βήματα:

  1. Ανοίξτε διάπλατα το στόμα.
  2. Γείρετε αργά το κεφάλι προς τα πίσω με το στόμα ανοιχτό. Αν νιώθετε την ανάγκη για στήριξη, σφίξτε τα χέρια σας πίσω από το κεφάλι σας.
  3. Πολύ αργά κλείστε και ανοίξτε το στόμα σας.
  4. Στο τέλος, επιστρέψτε αργά στην αρχική θέση και κλείστε το στόμα.

translations.name: تمتد الرقبة الأمامية
translations.description:
وضع البداية:

اجلس أو قف وظهرك مستقيما.

الخطوات:

  1. فتح الفم على نطاق واسع.
  2. إمالة الرأس ببطء مرة أخرى مع فتح الفم. إذا كنت تشعر بالحاجة إلى الدعم، شبك يديك وراء رأسك.
  3. إغلاق ببطء شديد وفتح فمك.
  4. في النهاية، والعودة ببطء إلى موقف البداية وإغلاق الفم.

translations.name: 前颈部拉伸
translations.description:
起始位置：坐位或站位，背部挺直。

步骤：

  1. 张大嘴巴。
  2. 保持嘴张开，慢慢仰头。可以将双手放在脑后支撑头部。
  3. 慢慢地合上嘴再张开。
  4. 最后，慢慢回到起始位置，合上嘴部。

total_authors_history: floris van den bosch (imported from Feeel)

translations.name: Rowing Machine
translations.description: Sit on a rowing machine with your back straight.

translations.name: Rudergerät
translations.description: Mit geradem Rücken gleichzeitig die Beine strecken und die Arme zum Körper hin anziehen.

translations.name: Press Banca Sentado
translations.description: Poner la máquina de press de pecho para que al sentarte los agarres estén alineados con la parte inferior del pecho. Asegúrate de que estás sentado con la espalda bien pegada al asiento. Agarra una manija con cada mano, saca el pecho hacia afuera, mantén la cabeza contra el reposacabezas. Respira profundamente y empuja lentamente las manijas hacia adelante hasta que tus brazos estén casi completamente extendidos. Haz una pausa justo antes del bloqueo, y luego regresa lentamente las manijas a la posición inicial. Haz una pausa justo antes de que las manijas se detengan completamente y realiza otra repetición

translations.name: Seated Bench Press
translations.description: Set up the chest press machine so that the grips are aligned with your lower chest when you sit down. Make sure you're sitting with your back flat against the seat. Grab a handle in each hand, stick your chest out, and keep your head against the headrest. Breathe deeply and slowly push the handles forward until your arms are almost fully extended. Pause just before the lockout, then slowly return the handles to the starting position. Pause just before the handles come to a complete stop and perform another repetition.

translations.name: Press de banca sentado
translations.description: Pon la máquina de press de pecho para que al sentarte los agarres estén alineados con la parte inferior del pecho. Asegúrate de que estás sentado con la espalda bien pegada al asiento. Agarra una manija con cada mano, saca el pecho hacia afuera, mantén la cabeza contra el reposacabezas. Respira profundamente y empuja lentamente las manijas hacia adelante hasta que tus brazos estén casi completamente extendidos. Haz una pausa justo antes del bloqueo, y luego regresa lentamente las manijas a la posición inicial. Haz una pausa justo antes de que las manijas se detengan completamente y realiza otra repetición.

translations.name: Seated bench press
translations.description: Position the chest press machine so that the grips are aligned with your lower chest when you sit down. Make sure you're sitting with your back flat against the seat. Grab a handle in each hand, stick your chest out, and keep your head against the headrest. Breathe deeply and slowly push the handles forward until your arms are almost fully extended. Pause just before the lockout, then slowly return the handles to the starting position. Pause just before the handles come to a complete stop and perform another repetition.

translations.name: Abduction while standing
translations.description: Training a stable stance, predominantly on one leg, is crucial for both sides. On the one hand, it prevents discomfort and, on the other, it establishes a stable foundation. The practitioner assumes the usual standing position and, with a stable upper body, attempts to repeatedly lift the unloaded leg, bend it at the hip and knee, and then lower it again. The movement is also repeated on the other side. The exercise trains the stability of the hip-surrounding muscles.

notes.comment: stabiler Oberkörper

translations.name: Abduktion im Stand
translations.description: Das Training des stabilen Standes dominat auf einem Bein ist beiseitig entscheidend. Einerseits um Beschwerden vorzubeugen und andererseits um eine stabile Basis zu legen.Die übende Person stellt sich in die gewohnte Standposition und versucht bei stabilem Oberkörper das unbelastete Bein wiederholt zu heben und und in Hüfte und Knie zu beugen und wieder zu senken. Die Bewegung wird jedenfalls auch mit der anderen Seite wiederholt. Die Übung trainiert die Stabilität der hüftumgebenden Muskulatur

translations.name: Seated rear delt rise
translations.description: Seated, bent 45 deg forward. Arms fully stretched out, raise arms up to shoulder height and back down

translations.name: Dynamic side hold
translations.description: Sling a rubber band on a kettlebell and lift the kettlebell by the rubber band. Let it hang by your side and stand on one leg, switch leg while continuing hold. Repeat with other hand

translations.name: Wall balls
translations.description: Get a medicine ball, shoulder width stance, squat, thrust the ball as high as possible against the wall and catch

translations.name: Horizontal traction isometry
translations.description: Perform a timed isometric pull-up on the bar

translations.name: Isometria trazioni orizzontali
translations.description: Esegui una trazione isometrica alla sbarra a tempo

translations.name: Affondi indietro alternati
translations.description: Si allenano maggiormente i muscoli posteriori dei glutei, femorali, soleo e gastrocnemio

translations.name: Alternate back lunges
translations.description: The posterior muscles of the buttocks, hamstrings, soleus and gastrocnemius are trained more

translations.name: Ponte in camminata
translations.description: Dalla posizione in piedi con le ginocchia leggermente flesse e le mani appoggiate a terra. Da qua procedete in avanti con le mani mantenendo i glutei contratti e senza perdere il controllo della schiena bassa.

translations.name: walking bridge
translations.description: from a standing position with knees slightly bent and hands resting on the floor. From here, proceed forward with your hands keeping your buttocks contracted and without losing control of your lower back.

translations.name: Walking
translations.description: Walking outdoor or indoor, try keeping a pace of at list 100 steps per minute.

translations.name: Seated Knee Tuck
translations.description: Sit on floor or mat. Place arms slightly behind you. Raise legs. Now extend your legs and pull them back.

translations.name: Seated Knee Tuck
translations.description: Sit on floor or mat. Place arms slightly behind you. Raise legs. Now extend your legs and pull them back.

translations.name: Biceps concentrado
translations.description: El curl de concentración es un ejercicio clásico para desarrollar los bíceps un brazo a la vez. Se puede realizar inclinado o de rodillas, pero se realiza más a menudo sentado en un banco. Es excelente para enfatizar el pico del bíceps y, a menudo, se usa para terminar un entrenamiento de bíceps.

translations.name: Cable Concentration Curl
translations.description: The concentration curl is a classic exercise for building the biceps one arm at a time. It can be performed bent over or kneeling, but is more often performed seated on a bench. It's great for emphasizing the biceps peak and is often used to finish a biceps workout

translations.name: Push-Ups | Incline
translations.description: Inclined push-ups primarily target the chest muscles (pectoralis major and minor), but also work the triceps, shoulders, and core to a lesser extent. Because the upper body is elevated, the incline push-up places less emphasis on the triceps compared to regular push-ups, which may be beneficial for individuals looking to specifically target their chest muscles.

translations.name: Pompes déclinées
translations.description:
Les pompes déclinées sont une autre version modifiée de la pompe traditionnelle qui sollicite les muscles du haut du corps d'une manière différente. Pour effectuer une pompe déclinée, surélevez vos pieds sur une surface surélevée, telle qu'un banc, une chaise ou une marche, tout en plaçant vos mains au sol en position de pompe. Abaissez votre corps vers le sol tout en maintenant une ligne droite de vos épaules à vos chevilles, puis remontez à la position de départ

Contrairement à la pompe inclinée, la pompe déclinée met davantage l'accent sur les épaules et les triceps, tout en engageant les muscles de la poitrine dans une moindre mesure. En surélevant vos pieds, vous augmentez la difficulté de l'exercice en plaçant plus de poids sur le haut de votre corps, forçant vos épaules et vos triceps à travailler plus fort pour repousser votre corps vers le haut.

La pompe déclinée peut être un excellent moyen de mettre à l'épreuve la force de votre haut du corps et d'améliorer votre capacité à effectuer d'autres variations de pompes. Comme pour tout exercice, assurez-vous d'utiliser une forme appropriée et de commencer avec une hauteur adaptée à votre niveau de force et de forme physique.

translations.name: Push-Ups | Decline
translations.description:
Decline push-ups are another modified version of the traditional push-up that target the upper body muscles in a different way. To perform a decline push-up, elevate your feet on an elevated surface, such as a bench, chair, or step, while placing your hands on the ground in a push-up position. Lower your body towards the ground while maintaining a straight line from your shoulders to your ankles, and then push back up to the starting position.

Unlike the inclined push-up, the decline push-up places more emphasis on the shoulders and triceps, while still engaging the chest muscles to a lesser extent. By elevating your feet, you increase the difficulty of the exercise by placing more weight on your upper body, forcing your shoulders and triceps to work harder to push your body back up. The decline push-up can be a great way to challenge your upper body strength and improve your ability to perform other push-up variations. As with any exercise, be sure to use proper form and start with a height that is appropriate for your strength and fitness level.

translations.name: Push-Ups | Parallettes
translations.description:
Parallettes push-ups are a variation of the traditional push-up that are performed with the hands on parallel bars, known as parallettes. To perform a parallettes push-up, assume a push-up position with your hands on the parallettes and your feet on the ground. Lower your body towards the ground while keeping your elbows close to your sides, and then push back up to the starting position.

Parallettes push-ups place more emphasis on the chest and shoulders compared to traditional push-ups, as they allow for a greater range of motion in the shoulder joint. This increased range of motion can also help to improve shoulder stability and mobility. Additionally, parallettes push-ups engage the core muscles more than traditional push-ups, as the instability of the parallettes requires greater activation of the core muscles to maintain proper form.

The added challenge of balancing on the parallettes also requires greater upper body strength and control, making parallettes push-ups a more advanced variation of the traditional push-up. They can be a great way to challenge yourself and add variety to your upper body workout routine. As always, be sure to use proper form and start with a level that is appropriate for your strength and fitness level.

translations.name: Rest (for timed workouts)
translations.description: When creating a workout based on time, add this to add rest time in the program

translations.name: 3D lunge warmup
translations.description: As a warmup, use light dumbbells, one in each hand. Lunge in alternating directions, forward, sideways, backwards and 45 degree angles.

translations.name: Dumbbell farmer's carrie
translations.description: Grab half your body weight in each hand and walk.

translations.name: Remo maquina agarre estrecho
translations.description: Remo en máquina con barra en agarre estrecho

translations.name: Remo maquina agarre estrecho supino
translations.description: Remo en máquina o polea con agarre cerrado supino

translations.name: Jalón abierto
Jalón abierto supino
Jalón cerrado
Jalón cerrado supino
Extensión de gluteos en polea
translations.description:
Esta actividad te permitirá ejercitar la zona del glúteo superior o mayor. Por ello, nunca puede faltar en tu rutina de ejercicios aislados para trabajar los glúteos.

Colócate en frente de una máquina de poleo y localiza el gancho inferior. Luego, sujétalo en las tobilleras para trabajar en polea baja. En relación a la postura, debes estar recto en todo momento. Presta especial atención a tu espalda para mantenerla derecha y no lastimarte.

Es recomendable que te sujetes a la máquina para tener más equilibrio. Con la pierna que estás sosteniendo el peso de la polea, realiza un estiramiento lento para atrás sin flexionar la rodilla.

translations.name: Extensión de gluteo en  máquina
translations.description: Un ejercicio de extensión de cadera GHD es uno de los mejores ejercicios para glúteos. Si bien el ejercicio se enfoca principalmente en los glúteos, también es excelente para la zona lumbar, las pantorrillas y los isquiotibiales.

translations.name: JALONES PECHO NEUTRO
translations.description:
El Jalón al pecho es un ejercicio importante para fortalecer la espalda y mejorar la postura, lo que puede contribuir a una vida más saludable. Para realizar este ejercicio correctamente y evitar lesiones, es importante seguir algunos pasos clave:

1. Colóquese frente a la máquina de poleas con las rodillas ligeramente dobladas y los pies en el suelo.

2. Agarre el mango de la polea con las palmas hacia abajo y las manos separadas a la anchura de los hombros.

3. Tire hacia abajo del mango hasta que toque o se acerque al pecho, manteniendo la posición durante uno o dos segundos.

4. Vuelva a subir el mango lentamente a la posición inicial, asegurándose de mantener los brazos y las manos rectos y la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento.

translations.name: PULL OVER POLEA ALTA
translations.description:
De pie, de cara al aparato, pies ligeramente separados, barra cogida en pronación, brazos extendidos, manos separadas una distancia igual a Ia anchura de los hombros.

- Espalda fija y la banda abdominal contraída, inspirar y llevar la barra hasta los muslos manteniendo los brazos extendidos. (o los codos ligeramente flexionados).
Espirar al final del movimiento.

translations.name: JALON EN BANCO INCLINADO
translations.description: Sobre el banco inclinado frete a la maquina de polea, con el cuerpo boca bajo sobre el banco, se realiza el jalón.

translations.name: Arabesque
translations.description: Take all your weight onto one leg and you're going to maintain that position, keeping your hips and pelvis level the whole time. With your back in a neutral position you want to tilt yourself forward kicking your leg back up and then slowly with your glutes bring yourself back up to neutral.

translations.name: Back extensión
translations.description: Espalda en maquina de extensión con peso

translations.name: Extensión de tríceps en polea con cuerda
translations.description:
La extensión de tríceps en polea con cuerda es un ejercicio efectivo para trabajar los músculos del tríceps, específicamente el músculo braquial y el tríceps braquial. Este ejercicio se realiza utilizando una polea alta y una cuerda como accesorio.

Beneficios del ejercicio
Aislamiento del tríceps: Permite un enfoque específico en los músculos del tríceps, ayudando a desarrollar fuerza y masa muscular.
Variedad de ángulos: La cuerda permite un rango de movimiento más natural, lo que puede ayudar a activar más fibras musculares.
Control del peso: Puedes ajustar fácilmente la carga en la polea, lo que permite un entrenamiento progresivo.
Cómo realizar la extensión de tríceps en polea con cuerda
Posición inicial: Colócate de pie frente a la polea alta. Ajusta la polea a la altura adecuada y coloca la cuerda en el gancho.
Agarre: Toma la cuerda con ambas manos, asegurándote de que las palmas estén enfrentadas entre sí.
Postura: Da un paso atrás para que haya tensión en la cuerda. Mantén los pies a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta.
Movimiento: Tira de la cuerda hacia abajo, separando las manos y extendiendo los codos. Asegúrate de mantener los codos cerca del cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.
Contracción: Al llegar a la parte inferior, aprieta los tríceps y mantén la posición durante un segundo.
Regreso: Regresa lentamente a la posición inicial, controlando el movimiento.

translations.name: Triceps Pushdown
translations.description: Triceps pushdown on cable using lat bar.

notes.comment: Triceps pushdown on cable

translations.name: One Arm Bent Row
translations.description: One arm bent over row on cable with a machine

translations.name: High Pull
translations.description: High pull down on cable on machine..

translations.name: Flexión lateral
translations.description: con una pesa en una mano, estiramos el brazo hacia abajo, flexionamos el otro brazo apoyando la mano en la cabeza. Ahora llevamos la mano con la pesa girando el torso arriba y abajo

translations.name: Curl de biceps con agarre prono
translations.description:
POSICIÓN INICIAL:

Seleccione el peso adecuado en una barra. Colóquese de pie con la barra usando un agarre prono y las manos a la anchura de los hombros. Contraiga el suelo pelvico y el core mientras mantiene su pecho levantado.

EJECUCIÓN:

Contrayendo los bíceps, doble los codos totalmente mientras exhala. Vuelva a la posición inicial con un suave movimiento mientras inhala.

translations.name: Alternating Biceps Curls With Dumbbell
translations.description:
Hold two barbells, the arms are streched, the hands are on your side, the palms face inwards. Bend one arm at a time and bring the weight with a fast movement up. At the same time, rotate your arms by 90 degrees at the very beginning of the movement. At the highest point, rotate a little the weights further outwards. Without a pause, bring the arm back down, slowly, and do the same with the other arm.

Don't allow your body to swing during the exercise, all work is done by the biceps, which are the only mucles that should move (pay attention to the elbows).

translations.name: Curl Bicipiti Alternato con Manubrio
translations.description:
Impugnare due bilancieri, le braccia sono distese, le mani sono sul fianco, i palmi rivolti verso l'interno. Piegare un braccio alla volta e portare il peso con un movimento veloce verso l'alto. Allo stesso tempo, ruotate le braccia di 90 gradi all'inizio del movimento. Nel punto più alto, ruotate un po' il peso verso l'esterno. Senza fare pause, riportare il braccio verso il basso, lentamente, e fare lo stesso con l'altro braccio.

Non lasciate che il corpo oscilli durante l'esercizio, tutto il lavoro è svolto dai bicipiti, che sono gli unici muscoli che devono muoversi (fate attenzione ai gomiti).

translations.name: Abdominales rusas
translations.description: sentado en el suelo agarramos la pesa rusa, flexionamos las piernas y las separamos del suelo. Ahora llevaremos a un lado y otro la pesa

translations.name: Russian Twist
translations.description:
1.  Hold a dumbbell, barbell weight or something else that is heavy with both hands, but make sure it is not too heavy and you are able to keep in form.
  2. Lean back to a 45-degree angle from the floor. For an extra challenge, lift your feet off the floor.
  3. Rotate your arms to one side to the same level as your chest, touch the floor for a little extra challenge, and then do the same to the other side. When you're back in your original position after doing both sides it will count as 1 rep.

notes.comment: Maintain a proper form. Keep weight as chest level or touch the floor on each side.
Only move your torso during the exercise. Reduce weight if necessary.

translations.name: PALLOF PRESS
translations.description:
The Pallof press is an anti-rotation exercise that trains the larger and smaller muscles around the spine to resist rotation.
  • Stand parallel to the cable machine or to the anchor point to the resistance band and clasp with the handle or band with both hands.
  • Make sure your torso is front on and bring your hands to the center of your chest and slowly press out.
  • Slowly return your hands to the chest and repeat.

translations.name: Side Slides + Squats
translations.description:
With feet a little wider than shoulder-width apart and staying low to mimic a defensive position, you should step with their lead leg and push off with their plant leg.
After three slides, rotate your body for 180 degree on the guiding (/outer) leg and do a squat. Continue.

notes.comment: Side Slide: https://youtu.be/ek79Rsc9ClU
Squat: https://youtu.be/cyJFiJOrTpY

translations.name: Wall Drills
translations.description:
Exercises for strengthening knee and leg musculature.
  • Lateral Wall Drills March - https://youtu.be/9RiTlJ6Mmek
  • Lateral Wall Drills OPEN - https://youtu.be/ADRlN8-Wfdg
  • Lateral Wall Drills CROSS - https://youtu.be/hGH2sj0Tzu4

translations.name: Inverted Rows
translations.description:
Maintain a straight body, retract your shoulder blades, and pull your 
chest to the bar for an effective back and upper body workout.

translations.name: Trazioni orizzontali
translations.description: Le trazioni orizzontali agiscono principalmente sui muscoli della schiena, mentre le trazioni lavorano maggiormente sui muscoli della parte superiore della schiena e delle braccia. Combinando questi due esercizi si ottiene un allenamento più completo per i muscoli della schiena e delle braccia.

translations.name: Elevación tibial anterior
translations.description:
1. Pararse derecho
  2. Levantar la punta de los pies, apoyándose sobre el talón.

translations.name: Tibialis raises
translations.description:
1. Stand up straight
  2. Lift the balls of your feet, resting on your heels.

translations.name: Dragon squat
translations.description: Start standing with your feet hip-width apart. Cross your right foot behind you to the left corner and back of the room while bending both knees. Return and repeat, alternating sides. Keep your hips and shoulders forward as you cross your feet and bend your knees.

translations.name: Dragon squat
translations.description: Comienza parado con los pies al ancho de las caderas. Cruza el pie derecho detrás de ti a la esquina izquierda y parte posterior de la sala mientras doblas ambas rodillas. Regresa y repite alternando los lados. Mantén las caderas y los hombros hacia adelante cuando cruzas los pies y doblas las rodillas.

translations.name: Side Lying Hip Abduction
translations.description:
• Begin by lying down on your side with your top leg straight and your bottom leg bent for support.  
  • Lift your top leg off the ground
  • (optional) - Hold position at the top
Resources:
  • 40 seconds YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g9FtnmsIYgI

translations.name: Calf raises, left leg
translations.description:
1. Stand on the floor or on the edge of a step to increase the range of movement. 
  2. Raise one foot.
  3. Lift your heel until you're standing on your toes.
  4. (variable) Stay in this position for three seconds
  5. Slowly lower your foot until you almost touch the ground with your heel - don't slam your foot!

translations.name: Cycling cardio session
translations.description: Sessió de càrdio en bicicleta estàtica Technogym Bike Excite 1000

translations.name: Wrist curl, dumbbells
translations.description:
1. Sitting on a bench, grab the dumbbell with your palms facing up and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs and allow your wrists to hang over your knees. 
  2. Perform the movement by curling your palms and wrists towards your face.
  3. (optional/variable) Pause at the top. 
  4. Slowly return to the starting position.

translations.name: Skorpion-Kick
translations.description:
Beginne in einer Liegestützposition mit den Händen unter den Schultern und dem Körper in einer geraden Linie.

Hebe langsam deine Beine an, indem du deine Knie biegst und versuchst, deine Füße über deinen Rücken zu bringen, während du deine Hüfte anhebst.

Halte deine Bauchmuskeln angespannt, um Stabilität zu gewährleisten, und versuche, die Füße in Richtung deines Kopfes zu bringen.

Halte diese Position kurz, bevor du die Beine wieder kontrolliert zurück in die Ausgangsposition bringst.

Wiederhole die Bewegung langsam und kontrolliert für die gewünschte Anzahl von Wiederholungen, wobei du darauf achtest, die Form beizubehalten und Verletzungen zu vermeiden.

translations.name: scorpion kick
translations.description:
Start in a plank position with hands under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.

Slowly lift your legs by bending your knees, aiming to bring your feet over your back while raising your hips.

Engage your core muscles for stability, trying to bring your feet towards your head.

Hold this position briefly before slowly and controlledly bringing your legs back to the starting position.

Repeat the movement slowly and steadily for the desired number of repetitions, ensuring to maintain form and avoid injuries.

translations.name: Scorpion Kick
translations.description: Get into the push-up position with your shoulders directly above your hands and your feet hip-width apart.  Make sure that your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.  Now pull your right knee towards your chest. While keeping your knee bent, lift your right leg as high as possible with your lower right leg pointing straight up.  Now rotate your hips so that your right foot swings over your left leg.  Continue to rotate and move your right foot towards the floor until you are forced to roll onto the outside of your left standing foot. Make sure that you do not rotate your upper body.  Now return to the starting position and repeat the exercise with your right leg.

translations.name: Skorpion-Kick
Prisoner Squat
translations.description: Stell dich mit leicht angehobenem Brustkorb aufrecht hin, deine Füße sind hüftbreit voneinander entfernt, die Zehen zeigen gerade nach vorne. Nimm deine Hände mit leicht verschränkten Fingern an den Hinterkopf, die Ellbogen zeigen zur Seite. Schiebe deine Hüfte nach hinten und beuge deine Knie, der Oberkörper bleibt dabei so aufrecht wie möglich. Drück deine Knie nach außen, sie dürfen auf keinen Fall zueinanderzeigen. Wenn sich dein Oberkörper leicht nach vorne bewegt, achte darauf, dass er sich nicht krümmt. Halte die Ellbogen stets auf Höhe der Ohren, indem du die Muskeln zwischen deinen Schulterblättern anspannst. Wenn du beweglich genug bist, kannst du so weit nach unten sinken, bis dein Gesäß deine Waden berührt. Achte dabei aber darauf, dass du deine Wirbelsäule nicht krümmst. Bevor das passiert, kehrst du die Bewegung um und drückst dich aus deinen Fersen und Gesäßmuskeln mit so viel Schwung nach oben, dass deine Füße kurz abheben und du einen kleinen Hüpfer machst. Korrigiere gegebenenfalls die Position der Füße, Arme und des Oberkörpers, bevor du die nächste Wiederholung anschließt.

translations.name: Prisoner Squat
Fallschirmspringer in T-Position
translations.description: Leg dich auf deinen Bauch, deine Beine sind mehr als schulterbreit gespreizt, die Füße aufgestellt. Deine Arme sind zur Seite ausgestreckt und bilden mit deinem Oberkörper ein T, deine Handflächen liegen auf dem Boden. Hebe nun unter Körperspannung deinen Oberkörper mitsamt Armen und deine Beine so weit an, wie du kannst. Dreh dabei die Daumen Richtung Decke und zieh deine Schulterblätter zusammen. Während du den Oberkörper und alle Gliedmaßen in der Luft hältst, bring deine Beine zusammen und spreiz sie dann wieder, dabei hältst du sie stetig in der Luft. Bei den weiteren Wiederholungen bewegst du nur noch die Beine auf und zu.

translations.name: Skydiver with arms in T-position
translations.description: Lie on your stomach with your legs more than shoulder-width apart and your feet up. Your arms are stretched out to the side and form a T with your upper body, your palms are on the floor. Now raise your upper body, arms and legs as high as you can while keeping your body under tension. Turn your thumbs towards the ceiling and pull your shoulder blades together. While keeping your upper body and all limbs in the air, bring your legs together and then spread them again, keeping them constantly in the air. For the remaining repetitions, only move your legs open and closed.

translations.name: Romanian deadlift, single leg
translations.description: Also known as:  RDL. Steps:

translations.name: Bent Over Rowing Reverse
translations.description:
The same as regular rowing, but holding a reversed grip (your palms pointing forwards):

Grab the barbell with a wide grIp (slightly more than shoulder wide) and lean forward. Your upper body is not quite parallel to the floor, but forms a slight angle. The chest's out during the whole exercise.

Pull now the barbell with a fast movement towards your belly button, not further up. Go slowly down to the initial position. Don't swing with your body and keep your arms next to your body.

notes.comment: Keep your chest out
Don't arch your back!
Pull the weight fast
Pull the weight towards your belly button, not further up

translations.name: Full Sit Outs
translations.description: (A) Stellen Sie sich auf Ihre Hände und Zehen in eine hohe Plankenposition. (B) Verlagern Sie Ihr Gewicht auf Ihre linke Hand, während Sie Ihren Körper nach rechts drehen. beugen Sie Ihr rechtes Bein hinter sich und strecken Sie Ihren rechten Arm nach oben. Kehre in die Mitte zurück und wiederhole dies auf der anderen Seite. Fahren Sie mit abwechselnden Seiten fort. Machen Sie es einfacher: Heben Sie Ihren Arm nicht an, nachdem Sie Ihr Bein hinter sich gebeugt haben. Machen Sie es schwieriger: Halten Sie Arm und Bein für zwei Zählungen gestreckt.

translations.name: Full Sit Outs
translations.description: (A) Get in high plank position on your hands and toes.(B) Shift your weight to your left hand as you turn your body to the right; bend your right leg behind you and extend your right arm up. Return to the center and repeat on the opposite side. Continue, alternating sides.Make it easier: Don’t raise your arm after you bend your leg behind you.Make it harder: Balance with your arm and leg extended for two counts.

translations.name: Reverse Snow Angel
translations.description: Lay flat on your stomach with your arms extended in front of you on the ground as your legs are lying flat. Lift both your arms and move them to your side slowly. Then, move them back.

translations.name: Recruitment Pulls
translations.description: Find a few specific edge sizes on a hangboard, get fixed underneath them with the board overhead, and pull with max effort, 1 arm at a time, for 3-5 seconds. When positioning for this get set up with a large elbow angle (120-150 degrees) and not in full extension.

translations.name: Finger Pushup
translations.description:
1. Hand Positioning:
   - Start in a plank position with your hands directly beneath your shoulders.
   - Spread your fingers wide apart, placing them firmly on the ground.

2. Finger Placement:
   - Gradually lift your palms off the ground, shifting the weight onto your fingers.
   - Focus on distributing the load evenly across your fingertips and thumbs.

3. Body Alignment:
   - Maintain a straight line from head to heels to engage your core.
   - Keep your body in a controlled and stable position throughout the exercise.

4. Lowering Phase:
   - Slowly bend your elbows, lowering your chest towards the ground.
   - Ensure controlled movement, maintaining stability on your fingertips.

5. Pushing Up:
   - Press through your fingertips to straighten your arms, returning to the starting position.
   - Emphasize the engagement of your fingers and thumbs throughout the push-up.

translations.name: Pompes sur les genoux
translations.description:
1. Commencez par vous agenouiller sur le sol, en gardant les genoux joints. Placez vos mains sur le sol devant vous, légèrement plus larges que la largeur des épaules.
  2. Assurez-vous que votre corps forme une ligne droite de la tête aux genoux. Les mains doivent être positionnées sous les épaules.
  3. Abaissez votre torse vers le sol en pliant les coudes tout en maintenant la stabilité du tronc. Les genoux restent en contact avec le sol.
  4. Poussez à travers les mains pour remonter à la position de départ. Assurez-vous de maintenir une contraction des muscles de la poitrine, des épaules et des bras en haut du mouvement.
  5. Effectuez le nombre souhaité de répétitions, en contrôlant le mouvement et en maintenant une bonne forme.

translations.name: knee push-ups
translations.description:
1. Start by kneeling on the floor, keeping your knees together. Place your hands on the floor in front of you, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
  2. Make sure your body forms a straight line from head to knees. Hands should be positioned below shoulders.
  3. Lower your torso towards the ground, bending your elbows while keeping your trunk stable. Keep your knees in contact with the floor.
  4. Push through your hands to return to the starting position. Be sure to maintain contraction of chest, shoulder and arm muscles at the top of the movement.
  5. Perform the desired number of repetitions, controlling the movement and maintaining good form.

translations.name: Australian pull-ups
translations.description:
1. Lie down under a high bar or suspension bar, positioned at an appropriate height.
  2. Position yourself on your back under the bar, gripping the bar with a supinated grip (palms facing you).
  3. Adjust your position so that your body is aligned straight from head to toe. Arms should be fully extended, shoulders stabilized, and legs aligned with the rest of the body.
  4. Bend your elbows and pull your chest towards the bar, contracting your back muscles. Imagine you're trying to bring your shoulder blades together.
  5. Hold the contraction at the top of the movement for a moment to maximize muscle activation.
  6. Slowly return to the starting position, extending your elbows.

translations.name: Tractions australiennes
translations.description:
1. Allongez-vous sous une barre fixe ou une barre de suspension, positionnée à une hauteur appropriée.
  2. Placez-vous sur le dos sous la barre, en saisissant la barre avec une prise en supination (paumes tournées vers vous).
  3. Ajustez votre position pour que votre corps soit aligné de manière droite des pieds à la tête. Les bras doivent être complètement étendus, les épaules stabilisées, et les jambes alignées avec le reste du corps.
  4. Fléchissez les coudes et tirez votre poitrine vers la barre, en contractant les muscles du dos. Imaginez que vous essayez de rapprocher vos omoplates l'une de l'autre.
  5. Maintenez la contraction au sommet du mouvement pendant un moment pour maximiser l'activation musculaire.
  6. Revenez lentement à la position de départ en étendant les coudes.

translations.name: Cable Chest Press - Decline
translations.description: Single arm chest press done with the cable machine. Use the other arm to brace bodyweight to focus on strength of the press, rather than balancing of the body. Start with the hand as close to the chest as possible, and then press against the cable at a slight decline and aiming towards the center of your chest.

translations.name: Shoulder Dumbbell Pendular Exercise
translations.description:
1. Lean forward to rest your hand on a chair or other object, holding a dumbbell in the other hand
  2. Gently swing the dumbbell in a circular motion

notes.comment: One clockwise circle and one counter-clockwise circle are together one rep.

translations.name: Shoulder External Rotation with Dumbbell
translations.description:
1. Lie on your side holding a dumbbell in your upper hand
  2. Tuck your elbow into your side and rest the hand in front of you
  3. Rotate the shoulder so the hand raises up
  4. Lower the hand down

translations.name: Claps over the head
translations.description: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. Raise your arms and clap over your head

translations.name: Dumbbell drag curls
translations.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Pull your elbows back and lift the dumbbells to your chest height. Slowly lower the dumbbell and repeat the exercise.

translations.name: Curl cuadriceps
translations.description: La extensión de piernas es un ejercicio de entrenamiento con pesas de resistencia que se enfoca en el músculo cuádriceps de las piernas. El ejercicio se realiza utilizando una máquina llamada Leg Extension Machine. Hay varios fabricantes de estas máquinas y cada uno es ligeramente diferente. La mayoría de los gimnasios y salas de pesas tendrán la máquina en sus instalaciones. La extensión de piernas es un ejercicio aislado dirigido a un grupo muscular específico, los cuádriceps. No debe considerarse como un entrenamiento total de piernas, como la sentadilla o el peso muerto. El ejercicio consiste en doblar la pierna a la altura de la rodilla y extender las piernas, para luego volver a bajarlas a la posición original.

translations.name: Leg Extension
translations.description: The leg extension is a resistance weight training exercise that targets the quadriceps muscle in the legs. The exercise is done using a machine called the Leg Extension Machine. There are various manufacturers of these machines and each one is slightly different. Most gym and weight rooms will have the machine in their facility. The leg extension is an isolated exercise targeting one specific muscle group, the quadriceps. It should not be considered as a total leg workout, such as the squat or deadlift. The exercise consists of bending the leg at the knee and extending the legs, then lowering them back to the original position.

translations.name: Incline Shoulder Press Up
translations.description:
1. Place your hands on the bench in a press up position
  2. Push your chest away from the bench to separate your shoulder blades
  3. Keeping your elbows straight, lower your chest towards the bench so your shoulder blades move closer together
  4. Push your chest away from the bench again

translations.name: Dumbbell wide bicep curls
translations.description:
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and palms facing forward. 

Bend your elbows and lift the dumbbells to your shoulders. Slowly return and repeat.

translations.name: Overhead Squat
translations.description: The barbell is held overhead in a wide-arm snatch grip; however, it is also possible to use a closer grip if balance allows.

translations.name: Codo unilateral polea alta
translations.description: Ejerecicio realizado en polea alta, de espaldas a la polea. Unilateral

translations.name: Kneck extension
translations.description: Unilateral triceps exercise with your back to the pulley, with the pulley at the top

translations.name: Dumbbell bicep curl to press
translations.description:
Bend your elbows and lift the dumbbells to your shoulders.

Push the dumbbells over your head while rotating your arms to make your palms face forward. Reverse it to lower down. Repeat the exercise.

translations.name: Correr en cinta
translations.description: La caminadora, o cinta de correr, es una herramienta versátil para el ejercicio que permite caminar, trotar o correr a diferentes velocidades e inclinaciones. Se puede utilizar para mejorar la salud cardiovascular, fortalecer músculos, quemar calorías y aumentar la resistencia.

translations.name: Laufen an Laufband
translations.description: Laufen auf dem Laufband ist eine effektive Cardio-Übung, die die Herzfrequenz erhöht und die Ausdauer trainiert. Sie beansprucht hauptsächlich die Beinmuskulatur, darunter die Waden, Oberschenkel und Gesäßmuskeln.

translations.name: Run - Treadmill
translations.description: Run on a treadmill

translations.name: Tapis roulant
translations.description: Corri su un tapis roulant (correre su tappeto rotante in palestra)

translations.name: Dumbbell rear delt row
translations.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend at your hips to make your back almost parallel to the floor. Let your arms hang down. Keep your arms in line with your shoulders. bend and lift your elbows out to the sides until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Slowly return and repeat

translations.name: Incline Bench Press - Dumbbell
translations.description:
• Bench should be angled anywhere from 30 to 45 degrees
  • Be sure to press dumbbells straight upward (perpendicular to the floor)

translations.name: Panca inclinata con manubri
translations.description:
• La panca dovrebbe essere inclinata ovunque da 30 a 45 gradi
  • Assicurati di premere i manubri verso l'alto (perpendicolarmente al pavimento)

translations.name: Schrägbankdrücken KH
translations.description: Setze dich auf die Bank, die Füße sind fest auf dem Boden und geben Halt, der Kopf liegt auf der Bank. Nehme die Hanteln in die Hand und drücke sie nach oben. Bringe die Hanteln nach unten, bis sie neben der Brust sind. Drücke das Gewicht wieder nach oben.

translations.name: Supino Inclinado com Halteres.
translations.description:
• O banco deve estar inclinado entre 30 e 45 graus.
    • Certifique-se de empurrar os halteres diretamente para cima (perpendiculares ao chão).

videos.codec_long: H.264 / AVC / MPEG-4 AVC / MPEG-4 part 10

translations.name: Dumbbell close grip bench press
translations.description:
Lie down with your back on a flat bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand. Raise your arms towards the ceiling with your palms facing each other and dumbbells pressed together.

Slowly lower the dumbbells to your chest, then slowly push them back. Repeat the exercise.

translations.name: Snach
translations.description: Stand with your feet at hip width and your shins against the bar. Grasp the bar at double shoulder width and, keeping your lower back flat, drive your heels into the floor to begin lifting the bar. When it's above your knees, explosively extend your hips and shrug your shoulders. Let the momentum carry the weight overhead.

translations.name: Dumbbell upright-row
translations.description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand in front of your body. Keep your palms towards your body. Lift you hands straight up until your hands are under your chin, then lower them. Repeat the exercise.

translations.name: Tirage menton avec haltères
translations.description: Tenez un haltère dans chaque main devant votre corps. Gardez vos paumes tournées vers votre corps. Levez vos mains tout droit jusqu'à ce qu'elles soient sous votre menton, puis baissez-les. Répétez l'exercice.

translations.name: Crunches With Cable
translations.description: Take the cable on your hands and hold it next to your temples. Knee down and hold your upper body straight and bend forward. Go down with a fast movement, rolling your back in (your ellbows point to your knees). Once down, go slowly back to the initial position.

notes.comment: Bend yourself inwards, the elbows point to the knees
Make a fast movement when going down

translations.name: Crunches am Seil
translations.description: Nehme das Kabel in die Hand und halte es neben den Schläfen fest. Knie dich nun vor dem Kabelzug mit geradem aber nach vorne gebeugtem Oberkörper hin. Rolle dich mit einer schnellen Bewegung zusammen, die Ellenbogen zeigen zu den Knien. Gehe langsam wieder zur Anfangsposition zurück.

notes.comment: Nach innen drehen, die Ellenbogen zeigen zum Knie
Schnell nach untern ziehen.

translations.name: Triceps stretch left
translations.description: Put your right hand on your back, use your left hand to grab your right elbow and gently pull it. Hold this position for a few seconds.

translations.name: Seated Cable Rows
translations.description: “Stay leaned forward - tuck elbows in on the negative”

translations.name: Tirar de cables sentados
translations.description: Manténgase inclinado hacia adelante, meta los codos en el lado negativo

translations.name: Triceps stretch right
translations.description: Put your right hand on your back, use your left hand to grab your right elbow and gently pull it. Hold this position for a few seconds.

translations.name: Standing biceps stretch left
translations.description: Stand with your left arm close to a wall. Extend your left arm and put your left hand on the wall, then gently turn your body to the right.

translations.name: Extension de triceps polea
translations.description: Coge el cable, párate con los pies a la altura de los hombros, mantén la espalda recta e inclínate un poco hacia delante. Empuje la barra hacia abajo, asegurándose de que los codos no se muevan durante el ejercicio. Gire las manos hacia afuera al final y vuelva a la posición inicial sin pausa.

translations.name: Triceps Extensions on Cable
translations.description: Grab the cable, stand with your feet shoulder wide, keep your back straight and lean forward a little. Push the bar down, making sure the elbows don't move during the exercise. Rotate your hands outwards at the very end and go back to the initial position without pause.

translations.name: Trizeps Seildrücken
translations.description: Stelle dich mit schulterbreitem Stand vor dem Kabelzug, beuge den Rücken sehr leicht nach vorn und greife das Seil. Ziehe nun nach unten, wobei die Ellenbogen sich während der ganzen Übung nicht von der Stelle bewegen sollen. Wenn die Arme ausgestreckt sind, drehe die Hände nach außen. Gehe langsam zur Ausgansposition zurück.

videos.codec_long: H.264 / AVC / MPEG-4 AVC / MPEG-4 part 10
H.264 / AVC / MPEG-4 AVC / MPEG-4 part 10

translations.name: Standing biceps stretch right
translations.description: Stand with your right arm close to a wall. Extend your right arm and put your left hand on the wall, then gently turn your body to the right.

translations.name: Dumbbell Single-leg Hip Thrust
translations.description:
The single-leg hip thrust is performed by placing your upper back on a weight bench, raising one leg, and extending the hip of the other leg to achieve an isolated contraction of the glute.

By working each side separately, you can fully isolate your glutes unilaterally, providing maximal training stimulus.

translations.name: Rowing with TRX band
translations.description: Rowing with resistance bands - Bodyweight Exercise

translations.name: TRX Rudern
translations.description: Rudern mit Schlingentrainer - Körpergewichtsübung

translations.name: Remo alto desde polea
translations.description: Remo alto desde polea alta con apoyo con agarre unilat

translations.name: Remo alto polea alta
translations.description: High pulley row with support using a single grip

translations.name: Agachamento parede
translations.description:
1. Encoste na parede, de frente com os pés firmes no chão, alinhados na largura dos ombros e afastados da parede cerca de 60 centímetros
  2. Deslize pela parede, mantendo as costas pressionada, até que as pernas fiquem em ângulo reto, paralelas ao chão. Os joelhos devem estar diretamente acima dos tornozelos.Dor no quadríceps é normal. Pare se sentir dor nos joelhos ou na rótula do joelho

translations.name: Asiento en pared
translations.description:
1. Apóyese en la pared, mirando hacia adelante y con los pies plantados firmemente en el suelo, sus hombros deben separarse y estar a 50 centímetros de la pared
  2. Deslízate por la pared, manteniendo la espalda presionada a ella, hasta que las piernas estén en ángulo recto. Las rodillas deben estar directamente sobre los tobillosEl dolor en el cuádriceps es normal, deténgase si siente dolor en la rodilla o en la rótula
author_history: Luis Alfredo Figueroa Bracamontes (imported from Feeel)

translations.name: Assis dos au mur
translations.description:
1. Appuyez-vous contre le mur, en regardant vers l'avant, les pieds fermement plantés au sol, écartés de la largeur des épaules et à une distance d'environ 60 cm du mur.
  2. Glissez le long du mur, en gardant le dos appuyé contre lui, jusqu'à ce que les jambes forment un angle droit. Les genoux doivent être directement au-dessus des chevilles.La douleur au quadriceps est normale, arrêtez si vous ressentez une douleur au genou ou à la rotule

translations.name: Duduk di dinding
translations.description:
1. Bersandar ke dinding, menghadap ke depan dan dengan kaki tertanam kuat di tanah, selebar bahu dan sekitar 2 kaki dari dinding
  2. Geser ke bawah dinding, dengan menahan punggung ditekan, sampai kaki berada pada sudut kanan. Lutut harus tepat di atas pergelangan kakiNyeri paha depan normal, hentikan jika merasakan nyeri pada lutut atau tempurung lutut

translations.name: Duvara yaslanarak oturma
translations.description:
1. Öne bakacak şekilde duvara yaslanın, ayaklar yere sıkıca oturtulmuş, omuz genişliğinde açılmış ve duvardan yaklaşık 60 cm uzakta olsun
  2. Bacaklar dik açı yapana kadar sırtınızı bastırarak duvardan aşağı kaydırın. Dizler doğrudan ayak bileklerinin üzerinde olmalıdırKuadriseps ağrısı normaldir, dizde veya diz kapağında ağrı hissederseniz durun

translations.name: Muurzitten
translations.description:
1. Leun tegen de muur en zet je voeten stevig op de grond; houd je schouders los en 60 cm van de muur verwijderd.
  2. Zak naar beneden en zorg dat je rug tegen de muur blijft totdat je knieën zich direct boven de enkels bevinden.Pijn in je dijbeenspieren is normaal. Stop als je pijn in je knie of knieholte voelt
author_history: floris van den bosch (imported from Feeel)

translations.name: Sed u stěny
translations.description:
1. Opřete se o zeď, směřující dopředu a s nohama pevně zasazenými na zemi, šířka ramen od sebe a asi 2 nohy od zdi
  2. Posuňte dolů po stěně a držte záda přitlačenou k ní, dokud nohy nejsou v pravém úhlu. Kolena by měla být přímo nad kotníkyQuadricep bolest je normální, zastavte se, pokud máte pocit bolesti v koleni nebo kolenním kloubu

translations.name: Seduta a muro
translations.description:
1. Appoggiati al muro, rivolto in avanti e con i piedi ben piantati sul terreno, le spalle divaricate e a circa 2 piedi di distanza dal muro
  2. Scivola giù lungo il muro, tenendo la schiena premuta contro di esso, fino a quando le gambe sono ad angolo retto. Le ginocchia dovrebbero essere direttamente sopra le caviglieIl dolore al quadricipite è normale, interrompi se avverti dolore al ginocchio o alla rotula

translations.name: Väggsits
translations.description:
1. Luta dig mot väggen med ansiktet framåt och med fötterna stadigt placerade på marken, med axelbredden isär och ungefär en meter från väggen.
  2. Glid nerför väggen med ryggen tryckt mot väggen tills benen står i en rät vinkel. Knäna ska befinna sig direkt ovanför fotlederna.Smärta i quadricepsen är normalt, sluta om du känner smärta i knäet eller knäskålen

translations.name: Wall Squat
translations.description:
Find a nice flat piece of wall and stand with your back leaning against the wall. Slowly slide down the wall while moving your feet away from it, until your thighs are parallel to the ground and both your knees and your hips are bent at a 90° angle. Cross your arms in front of your chest and hold this position for 30 seconds.

Variant: put a big inflated rubber ball (like a small basketball) between your knees and squeeze the ball while holding the squat position

translations.name: Wall Squat
translations.description: Mache einen klassischen Squat an der Wand. Lehne dich mit dem Rücken an die Wand und gleite langsam herunter bis du 90° in den Knien hast. Halte die Position 30 Sekunden.

translations.name: Κάθισμα τοίχου
translations.description:
1. Ακουμπήστε στον τοίχο, στραμμένοι προς τα εμπρός και με τα πόδια σταθερά στο έδαφος, στο πλάτος των ώμων και περίπου 60 cm μακριά από τον τοίχο
  2. Σύρετε την πλάτη σας προς τα κάτω στον τοίχο, κρατώντας την πιεσμένη πάνω του, μέχρι τα πόδια σας να βρίσκονται σε ορθή γωνία. Τα γόνατα πρέπει να είναι ακριβώς πάνω από τους αστραγάλουςΟ πόνος στον τετρακέφαλο είναι φυσιολογικός, σταματήστε εάν αισθάνεστε πόνο στο γόνατο ή την επιγονατίδα

translations.name: الجلوس على الحائط
translations.description:
وضع البداية:

يجب أن يكون ظهرك ملامسًا للجدار ، وركبتيك بزاوية قائمة ومتمركزة فوق الزوايا تمامًا. يجب أن تكون متجهًا للأمام ، مع المباعدة بين القدمين بمقدار عرض الكتفين ومثبتة بقوة على الأرض.للوصول إلى هذا الوضع ، يمكنك الاتكاء على الحائط ، على بعد حوالي قدمين من الحائط. انزلق على الحائط مع الاستمرار في الضغط على الظهر حتى تصبح ركبتيك بزاوية قائمة.

خطوات:

  1. الحفاظ على هذا الموقف.

ملحوظات:

ألم العضلة الرباعية طبيعي ، توقف إذا شعرت بألم في الركبة أو الرضفة.

translations.name: 直角坐墙
translations.description:
起始姿势：背部应该接触墙壁，膝盖成直角并位于角度的正上方。 面朝前，双脚分开与肩同宽，并牢牢踩在地上。要达到这个姿势，你可以靠在墙上，脚离墙约 2 英尺。 滑下墙壁，保持背部紧贴墙壁，直到膝盖成直角。

步骤：

  1. 保持这个姿势。

注：股四头肌疼痛是正常的，如果感觉膝盖或膝盖骨疼痛，请停止。

total_authors_history: Luis Alfredo Figueroa Bracamontes (imported from Feeel)
floris van den bosch (imported from Feeel)

translations.name: Frog stand
translations.description:
Starting position:

Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward, facing a wall or bench for support if needed.
Bend your knees into a squat position.
Place your hands on the ground in front of you, shoulder-width apart, with your fingers spread wide.
Make sure your elbows are under your shoulders and your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Upward phase:

Push with your feet and hands to lift your body off the ground.
Straighten your legs and arms, keeping your body aligned.
Engage your core and glutes to maintain the position.
If needed, rest your knees on the wall or bench for assistance.

translations.name: Standing Calf Stretch
translations.description: This stretch targets the gastrocnemius (the chief muscle of the calf of the leg, which flexes the knee and foot). It is easy to perform anywhere. All you need is a wall or a chair.

translations.name: Allenamento al sacco
translations.description: Allenamento al sacco migliora la definizione muscolare di: deltoidi; deltoidi posteriori; tricipiti; bicipiti.

translations.name: Bag training
translations.description: Bag training improves muscle definition of: deltoids; rear deltoids; triceps; biceps, as well as being a great cardio exercise

translations.name: Standing Soleus Stretch
translations.description: This stretch targets the Soleus part of your calf. It may be performed with a wall or chair.

translations.name: Exercise Band Dorsiflexion
translations.description: This exercise uses an exercise band. It targets the Soleus and Tibialis anterior.

translations.name: Rematore seduto al cavo
translations.description:
1. Sedetevi sulla macchina con i piedi ben piantati, un po' più larghi della larghezza delle spalle. Spingete i talloni e stringete i glutei. Afferrate la maniglia del cavo.
  2. Sedetevi in alto con una leggera flessione delle ginocchia. Stringete gli addominali e la schiena per mantenere un angolo perpendicolare al pavimento con il busto.
  3. Portare le spalle all'indietro e verso il basso. Stringetele tra loro mentre remate, pensando di stringere una matita tra di esse. Mentre lo fate, tirate la maniglia all'indietro verso di voi, arrivando proprio sopra l'ombelico.
  4. Fermatevi qui per un momento prima di restituire la maniglia, sempre stringendo le scapole. Una volta riportato il peso sulla pila, lasciate che le scapole si rilassino, senza tirare il busto in avanti.
  5. Ripetere il movimento

translations.name: Remo gironda agarre cerrado
translations.description:
Siéntate en la máquina con los pies bien plantados, separados un poco más que la anchura de los hombros. Impulsa los talones y aprieta los glúteos. Sujétate al mango del cable.
Siéntate erguido con las rodillas ligeramente flexionadas. Contrae los abdominales y la zona lumbar para mantener un ángulo perpendicular al suelo con el torso.
Mueve los hombros hacia atrás y hacia abajo. Apriétalos mientras remas, pensando en sujetar un lápiz entre ellos. Al hacerlo, tira del mango hacia ti, aterrizando justo encima del ombligo.
Haz una pausa antes de volver a colocar el mango, apretando los omóplatos. Una vez que hayas devuelto el peso a la pila, deja que los omóplatos se relajen, sin tirar del torso hacia adelante.
Repite el movimiento.

translations.name: Seated Cable Row
translations.description:
1. Take a seat on the machine with your feet planted, a little wider than shoulder width. Drive the heels, and squeeze the glutes. Grab onto the cable handle.
  2. Sit up tall with a slight bend through the knees. Tighten up the abs and low back to maintain a perpendicular angle to the floor with your torso.
  3. Roll the shoulders back and down. Squeeze them together as you row, thinking about pinching a pencil in between them. As you do this, pull the handle back towards you, landing right above your belly button.
  4. Pause here for a moment before returning the handle, still squeezing the shoulder blades. Once you've returned the weight to the stack, then allow the shoulder blades to relax, without pulling the torso forward.
  5. Repeat the movement.

translations.name: Exercise Band Plantarflexion
translations.description: Banded plantarflexion is a great way to bridge the gap between plantarflexion range of motion and the more strenuous calf raises in weight bearing. This can help strengthen the calf muscles, load the Achilles tendon, and improve plantarflexion range of motion.

translations.name: Double Leg Calf Raise
translations.description: The double leg heel raise is important to strengthen and create control and stability around the ankle and knee, and provide balance and control for the hip and pelvis.

translations.name: Esercizio di yoga: Mucca-gatto
translations.description: Iniziare assumendo la posizione a quattro piedi. Le mani sono sotto le spalle. Le dita sono aperte a ventaglio e assicurano una posizione stabile. È meglio appoggiare il peso anteriore del corpo sui pollici e sugli indici. Ora posizionate le gambe alla larghezza dei fianchi sul tappetino da yoga. Le cosce devono trovarsi verticalmente sotto i fianchi. Assicuratevi che il peso sia distribuito uniformemente tra le mani e le ginocchia. La testa è un prolungamento della colonna vertebrale e lo sguardo è rivolto verso il tappetino. La schiena è in posizione neutra. Inspirate profondamente e iniziate con il gatto. Con l'espirazione successiva, arrotondate la schiena vertebra per vertebra. Cercate di tirarvi il più possibile verso il soffitto. Tirate la testa verso il petto e inclinate il bacino. Ora inspirate profondamente e passate alla posizione opposta, quella della mucca. Piegate la schiena verso il basso, tirate leggermente indietro le spalle e sollevate la testa quanto più vi è comodo. Lo sguardo è rivolto verso l'alto. Espirate consapevolmente e tornate alla posizione del gatto. Con l'espirazione successiva, tornate alla mucca. Ripetete l'esercizio alcune volte e assicuratevi di essere nel flusso

translations.name: Gato-Vaca (movilidad espinal)
translations.description: Ejercicio de movilidad y estiramiento para la columna vertebral. Ideal como parte del calentamiento o enfriamiento.

translations.name: Yoga exercise: Cow-cat
translations.description: First get into the four-footed stance. The hands are underneath the shoulders. The fingers are fanned out wide and ensure a stable stance. It is best to rest your front body weight on your thumbs and index fingers. Now place your legs hip-width apart on the yoga mat. Your thighs should be vertically below your hips. Make sure that your weight is evenly distributed between your hands and knees. Your head is an extension of your spine and you are looking down at your mat. Your back is in a neutral position. Breathe in deeply and start with the cat. With the next exhalation, round your back vertebra by vertebra. Try to pull yourself as far as possible towards the ceiling. Pull your head towards your chest and tilt your pelvis. Now inhale deeply and move into the opposite position, cow pose. Bend your back down, pull your shoulders back slightly and lift your head as far as is comfortable for you. Your gaze is directed upwards. Breathe out consciously and switch back to the cat. With the next exhalation, switch back to cow. Repeat the exercise a few times and make sure that you are in the flow.

notes.comment: Wichtig: Bei Nacken- oder HWS-Problemen, den Kopf während der gesamten Übung gerade lassen.

translations.name: Front Lever
translations.description: The front lever is a figure where the body is kept in a horizontal position parallel to the floor.

translations.name: Front lever
translations.description: Il front lever è una figura dove il corpo viene mantenuto in posizione orizzontale parallela al pavimento.

translations.name: Schulterbreite Dreipunkt-Liegestütze
translations.description: Geh in die Liegestützposition, deine Schultern befinden sich direkt über den Händen, deine Füße sind hüftbreit voneinander entfernt. Zieh den Bauchnabel in Richtung Wirbelsäule und spann die Bauchmuskulatur an. Hebe deinen linken Fuß etwa fünf Zentimeter vom Boden an. Die Zehen zeigen gerade nach unten. Bewege dabei nicht deine Hüften. Dein Körper bildet während der ganzen Übung eine gerade Linie vom Kopf bis zu den Fersen. Nun beuge die Ellbogen, senke deinen Brustkorb bis zum Boden ab und drück dich wieder nach oben. Wiederhole die Übung auf der anderen Seite.

translations.name: Shoulder width three-point push-up
translations.description: Get into a push-up position with your shoulders directly above your hands and your feet hip-width apart. Draw your belly button in towards your spine and tighten your abdominal muscles. Lift your left foot about five centimetres off the floor. Point your toes straight down. Do not move your hips. Your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the exercise. Now bend your elbows, lower your chest to the floor and push yourself back up. Repeat the exercise on the other side.

translations.name: TRX roll out
translations.description: sostener las empuñaduras con las manos, alargar los brazos y mantenerlos paralelos a la altura del pecho. El movimiento que debes realizar es una abertura de los brazos alineados con los hombros mientas inclinas el cuerpo hacia delante. Intenta no realizar una extensión de hombro más allá de los 90º y mantén contraída la musculatura abdominal y los glúteos. Músculos implicados: Transverso, recto abdominal y erectores espinales

translations.name: TRX roll out
translations.description: sostener las empuñaduras con las manos, alargar los brazos y mantenerlos paralelos a la altura del pecho. El movimiento que debes realizar es una abertura de los brazos alineados con los hombros mientas inclinas el cuerpo hacia delante. Intenta no realizar una extensión de hombro más allá de los 90º y mantén contraída la musculatura abdominal y los glúteos. Músculos implicados: Transverso, recto abdominal y erectores espinales

translations.name: Ice Scream maker
